MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFFS PETER BEKEY and RICHARD BEKEY's Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Terms Of Written Settlement Agreement.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is transferred to be heard in department 501 on the same date at 9:30 a.m. That department handles all landlord-tenant matters per SF Local Rule 8.10(A)(1).

PLAINTIFFS' NOTICE OF MOTION FOR ENTRY OD JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO TERMS OF WRITTEN SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT is GRANTED. No opposition filed.
